data_description.object: Create a window or an automation profile

data_description.name: Name for this window (e.g. Living room south)
data_description.set_azimuth: Orientation of the window in degrees (0=North, 90=East, 180=South, 270=West)
data_description.fov_left: Field of view angle to the left of the window center
data_description.fov_right: Field of view angle to the right of the window center

data_description.automation_id: Select the automation profile to link to this window. The profile defines schedules, climate and override settings.

window_automation.title: Link automation
window_automation.description: Select an automation profile for this window

data_description.group: Select entities to control via integration
data_description.distance_shaded_area: Distance from cover to shaded area in meters
data_description.default_percentage: Default cover position as a percentage
data_description.sunset_position: Position to switch to after sunset
data_description.max_position: Maximum adjustable cover position as a percentage
data_description.min_position: Minimum adjustable cover position as a percentage
data_description.sunset_offset: Offset (±) from sunset time in minutes
data_description.sunrise_offset: Offset (±) from sunrise time in minutes
data_description.inverse_state: Needed for some covers that don't follow HA guidelines

vertical.description: Add configuration variables to the sensor
vertical.title: Vertical cover

data_description.window_height: Adjust the height of the awning from the level of the workarea
data_description.angle: Angle of the attached awning measured perpendicular from the wall to the ground
data_description.distance_shaded_area: Distance from cover to shaded area in meters
data_description.default_percentage: Default cover position as a percentage
data_description.max_position: Maximum adjustable cover position as a percentage
data_description.min_position: Minimum adjustable cover position as a percentage
data_description.group: Select entities to control via integration
data_description.sunset_position: Position to switch to after sunset
data_description.sunset_offset: Offset (±) from sunset time in minutes
data_description.sunrise_offset: Offset (±) from sunrise time in minutes
data_description.inverse_state: Needed for some covers that don't follow HA guidelines

horizontal.description: Add configuration variables to the sensor
horizontal.title: Horizontal cover

data_description.slat_depth: Depth of each individual slat in centimeters
data_description.slat_distance: Vertical distance between two slats in centimeters
data_description.default_percentage: Default cover position as a percentage
data_description.max_position: Maximum adjustable cover position as a percentage
data_description.min_position: Minimum adjustable cover position as a percentage
data_description.group: Select entities to control via integration
data_description.sunset_position: Position to transition to after sunset
data_description.sunset_offset: Offset (±) from sunset time in minutes
data_description.sunrise_offset: Offset (±) from sunrise time in minutes
data_description.inverse_state: Needed for some covers that don't follow HA guidelines

tilt.description: Add configuration variables to the sensor
tilt.title: Tilted cover

data_description.blind_spot_elevation: Any value equal or less is considered within the blindspot. Useful if the sun can shine over the object in the blindspot

blind_spot.title: Blindspot
blind_spot.description: Setup blindspot for the cover. These values are relative degrees to the width of the field of view. Where 0 is the leftmost position taken from the field of view left parameter.

data_description.interp_list: List of interpolation values, where 0 is fully closed and 100 is fully open
data_description.interp_list_new: Custom range of interpolation values, where the beginning should represent closed and the end open

interp.title: Range Adjustment
interp.description:
Adjust the values at which your Cover effectively opens or closes. Ideal for Covers that don't fully open at 0% or close at 100%. 
 The first two sliders are for a 2 point adjustment, the list options are for a multiple point adjustment

data.name: Name
data.manual_ignore_intermediate: Ignore intermediate positions during manual override
data.return_sunset: Always adjust position to sunset default at end time

data_description.name: Name for this automation profile (e.g. Weekdays, Summer)
data_description.delta_position: Minimum change in position required before adjusting the cover's position
data_description.delta_time: Minimum time interval between position changes; minimum is 2 minutes
data_description.start_time: Starting time for each day; before this time, the cover will remain stationary
data_description.start_entity: Entity representing starting time, overrides the fixed start time above
data_description.manual_override_duration: The duration of manual control before resetting to automatic control
data_description.manual_override_reset: Reset the manual override duration after each manual adjustment
data_description.end_time: Ending time for each day; after this time, the cover will remain stationary
data_description.end_entity: Entity representing ending time, overrides the fixed end time above
data_description.return_sunset: Useful if end time is before actual sunset

automation.title: Automation profile
automation.description: Configure the automation profile. These settings will apply to all windows linked to this profile.

data_description.presence_entity: Entity representing room or home presence status
data_description.weather_entity: Monitors weather conditions and outside temperature
data_description.outside_temp: Overrides outside temperature from weather entity if both are set
data_description.transparent_blind: The blind is transparent and should always close fully when summer mode is active
data_description.lux_entity: Use lux sensor to determine if cover should reduce glare in presence mode
data_description.lux_threshold: Threshold for lux sensor, above this value glare should be reduced
data_description.irradiance_entity: Use irradiance sensor to determine if cover should reduce glare in presence mode
data_description.irradiance_threshold: Threshold for irradiance sensor, above this value glare should be reduced

data_description.weather_state: Choose the weather conditions that enable automatic window control.

data.manual_ignore_intermediate: Ignore intermediate positions during manual override
data.return_sunset: Always adjust position to sunset default at end time

data_description.delta_position: Minimum change in position required before adjusting the cover's position
data_description.delta_time: Minimum time interval between position changes; minimum is 2 minutes

data_description.start_entity: Entity representing starting time, overrides the fixed start time above
data_description.manual_override_duration: The duration of manual control before resetting to automatic control
data_description.manual_override_reset: Reset the manual override duration after each manual adjustment
data_description.end_time: Ending time for each day; after this time, the cover will remain stationary
data_description.end_entity: Ensure position is adjusted to the sunset default by end time. Useful when end time precedes actual sunset.
